finance.module.name: Accounting

finance.chart.trend.title: Cash flow trend
finance.empty.setup_first: Create at least one account and one category before recording a transaction.
finance.empty.categories: Create a category before setting a budget.
finance.setup.accounts_sub: Accounts are identified locally by integer ids; names stay editable.
finance.setup.categories_sub: Categories belong only to this currency and this module.

finance.card.ledger.title: Recent ledger
finance.card.new.sub: Record income or spending · balances update atomically
finance.card.new.title: Add Transaction
finance.card.transfer.sub: Move money between accounts · generates paired rows
finance.card.transfer.title: Transfer
finance.card.transfer.needs_two_accounts: A transfer needs two different accounts — create another account first.
finance.page.sub: A standalone personal ledger for accounts, transactions, transfers, budgets and reports.
finance.page.title: Accounting
finance.field.name: Name
finance.err.date_format: Date format must be YYYY-MM-DD, got '{payload}'
finance.err.amount_invalid: amount '{payload}' is not a valid number
finance.err.amount_sign_invalid: Expense amounts must be negative and income amounts must be positive
finance.err.note_too_long: note must be at most {payload} characters
finance.err.tone_invalid: tone must be empty or one of {payload}
finance.err.account_in_use: Account has a balance or transaction history and cannot be deleted
finance.err.category_in_use: Category has transaction history and cannot be deleted
finance.err.currency_decimals_locked: precision cannot change once the currency stores minor-unit values
finance.err.currency_in_use: Currency still owns accounts, categories, budgets, or transactions and cannot be deleted
finance.err.currency_primary_delete: The primary currency cannot be deleted; select another primary first
finance.err.account_name_taken: An account named '{payload}' already exists in this currency
finance.err.category_name_taken: A category named '{payload}' already exists in this currency
finance.err.transfer_edit_forbidden: Transfer legs are immutable; delete the transfer and create it again
finance.err.transfer_account_archived: Archived accounts cannot be used for a new transfer
